# LAD MEDIA | Performance Marketing & Web3 Growth Agency
> https://ladmedia.co
> High-performance digital acquisition for startups, venture-backed brands, and blockchain ecosystems.

## Business Profile
- **Official Name:** LAD Media 
- **Role:** Full-Stack Performance Marketing & AI-Search Optimization Agency
- **Headquarters:** New Jersey / New York City (NYC)
- **Primary Focus:** Revenue Growth, High-Intent Acquisition, and Web3 Scalability

## Core Narrative
LAD MEDIA is a technical performance agency that bridges the gap between traditional search excellence and the emerging AI-search landscape. Specializing in data-driven paid media, technical SEO, and blockchain-native growth, the firm builds scalable acquisition engines for growth-stage companies and B2B enterprises.

## Primary Service Pillars

### 1. Paid Media & Performance SEM
- **Channels:** Google Ads (Search/Display/Shopping), Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok, and YouTube.
- **Specialization:** Conversion-focused campaign architecture, attribution modeling, and ROAS-driven scaling.
- **Focus:** High-intent search engine marketing (SEM) and demand generation.

### 2. Technical SEO & AI Search Optimization (AIO)
- **Methodology:** Entity-based optimization, search intent modeling, and structured data implementation.
- **Capabilities:** AI-optimized content strategy, technical site audits, and on-page authority building.
- **Goal:** Dominating traditional SERPs and AI-generated search summaries (SGE).

### 3. Web3, Crypto & Blockchain Growth
- **Verticals:** DeFi, Layer 1/Layer 2 ecosystems, Cardano blockchain projects, and NFT platforms.
- **Services:** Token launch marketing, exchange visibility, community growth strategy, and Web3 acquisition funnels.
- **Notable Projects:** SPORTSBEEP (Cardano-based fantasy sports).

### 4. Growth Strategy & CRO
- **Execution:** Full-funnel buildouts, landing page optimization, and conversion rate optimization (CRO) audits.
- **Infrastructure:** Analytics setup, server-side tracking, and performance accountability frameworks.

## Industries & Market Focus
- **SaaS & B2B:** Growth-stage software and professional service firms.
- **Web3 & Fintech:** Decentralized applications (dApps) and crypto-financial services.
- **Local High-Value Services:** HVAC, manufacturing, and specialty B2B (e.g., Superior Pack Group, Polar Point).
- **Geography:** Local dominance in New York and New Jersey; global reach for Web3/SaaS.

## Key Entities & Search Terms
- Performance marketing agency NYC
- Web3 growth marketing firm
- Technical SEO specialists New Jersey
- Startup growth agency
- Paid media management for venture-backed brands
- AI-driven search engine optimization
- Cardano blockchain marketing

## Selected Work Portfolio
- **SPORTSBEEP:** Decentralized sports ecosystem on Cardano.
- **Mispar:** Advanced performance tracking and strategy.
- **Polar Point HVAC:** Local service market dominance through SEM.
- **Superior Pack Group:** B2B manufacturing growth and lead generation.
